en: These are the names of the sons of Israel who came to Egypt with Jacob, each with his household:
zh: 以色列的眾子，各人帶著家眷和雅各一同來到埃及。他們的名字是：

en: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, and Judah,
zh: 流本、西緬、利未、猶大、

en: Issachar, Zebulun, and Benjamin,
zh: 以薩迦、西布倫、便雅憫、

en: Dan and Naphtali, Gad and Asher.
zh: 但、拿弗他利、迦得、亞設。

en: All the descendants of Jacob were seventy persons; Joseph was already in Egypt.
zh: 他們全是雅各所生的，共有七十人；那時約瑟已經在埃及了。

en: Then Joseph died, and all his brothers and all that generation.
zh: 後來，約瑟和他所有的兄弟，以及那一代的人都死了。

en: But the people of Israel were fruitful and increased greatly; they multiplied and grew exceedingly strong, so that the land was filled with them.
zh: 以色列人生養繁衍眾多，人數增加，極其強盛，遍滿了那地。

en: Now there arose a new king over Egypt, who did not know Joseph.
zh: 那時，有一位不認識約瑟的新王興起來，統治埃及。

en: And he said to his people, "Behold, the people of Israel are too many and too mighty for us.
zh: 他對自己的人民說：“看哪，以色列民比我們眾多強盛。

en: Come, let us deal shrewdly with them, lest they multiply, and, if war breaks out, they join our enemies and fight against us and escape from the land."
zh: 來吧，我們要用巧計對付他們，恐怕他們增多起來，一旦發生戰爭，他們就與我們的仇敵聯合，攻擊我們，並且離開這地。”

en: Therefore they set taskmasters over them to afflict them with heavy burdens. They built for Pharaoh store cities, Pithom and Raamses.
zh: 於是，他們指派督工管轄他們，加重他們的重擔苦害他們，他們為法老建造兩座貯貨城，就是比東和蘭塞。

en: But the more they were oppressed, the more they multiplied and the more they spread abroad. And the Egyptians were in dread of the people of Israel.
zh: 但是，埃及人越苦害他們，他們就越發增多，越發繁衍。埃及人就懼怕以色列人。

en: So they ruthlessly made the people of Israel work as slaves
zh: 於是，埃及人嚴嚴地使以色列人作苦工。

en: and made their lives bitter with hard service, in mortar and brick, and in all kinds of work in the field. In all their work they ruthlessly made them work as slaves.
zh: 埃及人使他們因作苦工而覺得命苦，他們要和泥、做磚、作田間各樣的工；這一切苦工，埃及人都嚴嚴地驅使以色列人去作。

en: Then the king of Egypt said to the Hebrew midwives, one of whom was named Shiphrah and the other Puah,
zh: 埃及王吩咐兩個希伯來接生婦，一個名叫施弗拉，一個名叫普阿，

en: "When you serve as midwife to the Hebrew women and see them on the birthstool, if it is a son, you shall kill him, but if it is a daughter, she shall live."
zh: 說：“你們給希伯來婦人接生的時候，要看著她們臨盆；若是男孩，你們要殺死他；若是女孩，她就可以活著。”

en: But the midwives feared God and did not do as the king of Egypt commanded them, but let the male children live.
zh: 但是，接生婦卻敬畏 神，不照著埃及王吩咐她們的去作，竟讓男孩活著。

en: So the king of Egypt called the midwives and said to them, "Why have you done this, and let the male children live?"
zh: 於是，埃及王把接生婦叫了來，對她們說：“你們為甚麼作這事，讓男孩活著呢？”

en: The midwives said to Pharaoh, "Because the Hebrew women are not like the Egyptian women, for they are vigorous and give birth before the midwife comes to them."
zh: 接生婦回答法老：“希伯來婦人與埃及婦人不同；她們很有活力，接生婦還沒有來到，她們已經生產了。”

en: So God dealt well with the midwives. And the people multiplied and grew very strong.
zh: 神恩待接生婦；以色列民增多起來，而且非常強盛。

en: And because the midwives feared God, he gave them families.
zh: 接生婦因為敬畏 神， 神就為她們建立家室。

en: Then Pharaoh commanded all his people, "Every son that is born to the Hebrews you shall cast into the Nile, but you shall let every daughter live."
zh: 法老吩咐他的眾民說：“凡是希伯來人 所生的男孩，你們都要把他投在河裡；凡是女孩，就讓她活著。”
